cmd: echo === ROOT ===; curl -sk -m 10 -D - http://unitex.rdport.net/ -o /tmp/r.html; head -c 600 /tmp/r.html; echo; echo === PATHS ===; for p in ekspedytor expeditor Ekspedytor Expeditor unitex Unitex base 1c ka; do code=$(curl -sk -m 8 -o /dev/null -w %{http_code} http://unitex.rdport.net/$p/); od=$(curl -sk -m 8 -o /dev/null -w %{http_code} http://unitex.rdport.net/$p/odata/standard.odata/); echo "/$p -> $code, odata -> $od"; done
